title: Guaxinim's Vanilla +
description: A “Vanilla Plus” modpack for Minecraft is designed to improve and expand the experience of the base game without drastically altering its essence
body:
A “Vanilla Plus” modpack for Minecraft is designed to improve and expand the experience of the base game without drastically altering its essence. Here are some common elements you can find in a modpack of this type:

1. Vanilla compatibility: Mods are chosen to complement the base game, ensuring that the transition to the modified game is smooth and hassle-free.

2. New Blocks and Items: Addition of new blocks and items that integrate seamlessly into the vanilla world, such as new types of wood, stones, and decorative items.

3. World Generation Improvements: Mods that improve biome generation, adding more variety and detail to the world, such as new types of forests, mountains and caves.

4. New Creatures and Mobs: Introduction of new creatures that fit in with the vanilla game style, such as new animals, monsters and NPCs.

5. Optimizations and Performance Improvements: Mods that improve the game's performance and add support for shaders, providing a richer visual experience.

6. New Structures and Dungeons: Addition of new structures and dungeons to explore, offering more challenges and rewards for players.

7. Improved User Interface: Mods that improve the user interface, such as minimaps, improved HUDs and inventory tools.

These elements help to enrich the gaming experience without losing the original vanilla Minecraft feel. If you're looking for a more varied and challenging experience, but still want to keep the essence of the base game, a “Vanilla Plus” modpack is an excellent choice!
